canto_title: The Prayer of the Souls and the Vanity of Earthly Glory

scenes.summary: The souls begin their recitation of the Lord's Prayer by exalting the glory and eternal nature of God.
The prayer continues with requests for daily sustenance, divine forgiveness, and protection from temptation.
The souls move deeper into the first terrace of Purgatory, struggling under the weight of their purification.
A reflective moment regarding how the prayers of those in Heaven can assist the souls in Purgatory.
The souls ask Dante and Virgil for guidance on the easiest path to ascend the mountain.
Virgil responds to the souls' request, providing instructions for the climb while noting his own physical struggle.
A soul named Omberto recounts his noble lineage and how his pride led to his death.
A soul notices Dante and Virgil, prompting Dante to ask if the man is the painter Oderisi of Gubbio.
The soul denies being Oderisi and confesses how his worldly desires led to his downfall.
The soul reflects on how fame in the arts and literature is fleeting and constantly superseded by new masters.
The soul compares the transient nature of worldly wealth and time to a passing breeze.
The soul laments the decline of the political power and influence of Siena.
Dante acknowledges the truth of the soul's grim observations with humility.
The soul identifies the previously mentioned figure as Provenzan Salvani, a man driven by political ambition.
Dante asks if prayer can help a soul like Salvani find relief before the long wait for release is over.

scenes.scene_name: The Story of the Great Sacrifice
scenes.summary: The soul recounts the heavy price Salvani paid to rescue a friend from imprisonment.
